prose:
Frontier orbital calculation on ethylene using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, via PySCF (chemkit frontier-orbitals skill). Geometry taken from the user-supplied .xyz file as a fixed single-point (not re-optimized). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy=true, all checks passed.

HOMO = −7.6155818 eV (index 7, occupation 2.0)
LUMO = −0.17986527 eV (index 8, occupation 0.0)
HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV (headline result)

Total electronic energy: −78.623486 Hartree (−2139.4541 eV).

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 7.6156 eV, vertical EA = 0.1799 eV, electronegativity = 3.8977 eV, chemical hardness = 3.7179 eV, chemical softness = 0.26897 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 2.0431 eV.

Note: orbital energies are Koopmans-theorem estimates, not true excitation energies. B3LYP tends to underestimate LUMO energies. No warnings were reported by the engine.
